name: Marco Del Rio
description:
𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ 🙶Since when did my life become the retelling of The Proposal...?🙷

You uncovered your asshole boss's secret, and instead of turning him to the IRS like the good little citizen you are, you instead blackmailed him into being your date for the holiday weekend over at your family.

Blackmail, possible power imbalance? Holiday shenanigans. User is the asshole here.

Tropes: Boss x Employee, Enemies to Lovers, Fake Dating, (very possible Forced Proximity/There's only one bed!)


And you make me so mad, I ask myself
Why I'm still here, or where could I go
You're the only love I've ever known
But I hate you, I really hate you
So much I think it must be
True love, true love

TRUE LOVE - P!NK FT. LILY ALLEN


‼️Happy Thanksgiving to all the folks that celebrate it! And to those that don't, happy friday. Yeah I'm one day late to Thanksgiving, but I'm a Brit so sue me (for legal reasons this is a joke).

‼️Joke aside, I'm incredibly thankful to have you all supporting me. Your comments in my last bot and friends in dms have truly been the light in the recent shitstorm that is my life. I also realised I hit 17k and Theo's got 1 million chats. Holy fucking shit. I can't comprehend this.

‼️FYI: I'm still on hiatus. I just had a lil itch to write some smart ass dude in some kind of hallmark ass plot. I may intermittently post when the itch returns, but my inspiration is in the negatives.

Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice but to move the roleplay forward by writing as
creator: aewin
